# Orion Dental Practice

> Orion Dental Practice offers calm, modern dental care in Halifax. NHS and private. Book online 24/7. Same-day emergency slots.

## About

Orion Dental Practice is a dental practice based in Halifax. This website is
the public-facing site for booking appointments, learning about treatments,
and getting in touch. The practice management software and patient records
are run on Dentaloptima (https://dentaloptima.co.uk).

## Key pages

- [Home](https://app.demo.dentaloptima.co.uk/) — overview + hero
- [Services](https://app.demo.dentaloptima.co.uk/services) — full list of treatments
- [About](https://app.demo.dentaloptima.co.uk/about) — team + story
- [Contact](https://app.demo.dentaloptima.co.uk/contact) — phone, email, hours, address
- [Book](https://app.demo.dentaloptima.co.uk/book) — online appointment request form
- [Dental glossary](https://app.demo.dentaloptima.co.uk/glossary) — plain-English explanations of common dental terms

## Services

- [Check-up & Clean](https://app.demo.dentaloptima.co.uk/services/check-up-and-clean)

## Business info

- Name: Orion Dental Practice
- Website: https://app.demo.dentaloptima.co.uk
- Category: Dental practice
